questionHtml: 15 32 P  undergoes beta-minus (β–) decay. Explain why the energy gained by the emitted beta particles in this decay is not the same for every beta particle.
markschemeHtml:
«electron» antineutrino also emitted ✔

energy split between electron and «anti»neutrino ✔
